title: • Resume: 82/100
content:
• Resume: 82/100

⸻

Letter for Nandi Marrero

Dear Nandi,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. You’ve put together strong materials, and I appreciate the effort you’ve put into them. Below is my feedback.

Your cover letter is well-written and maintains a professional tone. You do a great job of introducing yourself and explaining your qualifications. However, one area where you could improve is making the letter more tailored to the specific role and company. Right now, the letter provides a strong general overview, but adding details about why you are drawn to this particular company would make it more compelling. Also, your closing paragraph could include a stronger call to action, such as requesting an interview.

Your resume is well-structured and presents your background in a clear and professional manner. The skills section is strong, but your work experience section could be improved by adding more quantifiable achievements—specific numbers or results will help demonstrate the impact of your work. Additionally, check for consistent formatting in spacing and punctuation.
